title: Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat
tagline: Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: Burhi Gosani Devalaya is a Hindu shakta temple which was originally used to worship the primordial deity Burhi and was later sanskritised to goddess Durga.
overview.description: Burhi Gosani Devalaya is a Hindu shakta temple which was originally used to worship the primordial deity Burhi and was later sanskritised to goddess Durga. It is situated at Dewal Road in Jorhat, Assam, India.

topPlaces.name: Asam Sahitya Sabha
topPlaces.description: The Asam Sahitya Sabha (Assamese: অসম সাহিত্য সভা, pronounced [ɔxɔm xaɦitːjɔ xɔbʱa], lit. 'The Literary Society of Assam') is a non-government, non-profit, literary organisation of Assam. It was founded in December 1917 in Assam, India to promote the culture of Assam and Assamese literature.

topPlaces.name: Dipankar Vidyapith
topPlaces.description: Dipankar Vidyapith is an Assamese medium private school in Jorhat, India. It is located near Malow Ali in the heart of the city.

topPlaces.name: Kumar Kaibarta Gaon
topPlaces.description: Kumar Kaibarta Gaon is a census town in Jorhat district in the Indian state of Assam.

topPlaces.name: Naubaisa Gaon
topPlaces.description: Naubaisa Gaon is a census town in Jorhat district in the Indian state of Assam.

topPlaces.name: Pragya Academy, Jorhat
topPlaces.description: Pragya Academy is a Junior College in Jorhat of Assam, India. Pragya Academy is a co-educational institution, in a self-contained campus with all necessary infrastructural facilities.

topPlaces.name: Jorhat
topPlaces.description: Jorhat ( JOR-haht/Assamese: [zʊ(ɹ).ɦat]) is a city in the Indian state of Assam, located 300 km east of state capital Dispur. It is the administrative headquarters of the Jorhat District.

topPlaces.name: Jorhat Gymkhana Club
topPlaces.description: Jorhat Gymkhana Club is a multi-purpose stadium located in Jorhat, Assam, built in 1876 by D. Slimmons. It has venues for horse racing, lawn tennis courts, swimming pool, snooker, polo, golf, and cricket.

topPlaces.name: Dimaruguri
topPlaces.description: Dimaruguri is a census town in Nagaon district in the state of Assam, India.

items.note: The Asam Sahitya Sabha (Assamese: অসম সাহিত্য সভা, pronounced [ɔxɔm xaɦitːjɔ xɔbʱa], lit. 'The Literary Society of Assam') is a non-government, non-profit, literary organisation of Assam. It was founded in December 1917 in Assam, India to promote the culture of Assam and Assamese literature.
Dipankar Vidyapith is an Assamese medium private school in Jorhat, India. It is located near Malow Ali in the heart of the city.
Kumar Kaibarta Gaon is a census town in Jorhat district in the Indian state of Assam.
Naubaisa Gaon is a census town in Jorhat district in the Indian state of Assam.
Pragya Academy is a Junior College in Jorhat of Assam, India. Pragya Academy is a co-educational institution, in a self-contained campus with all necessary infrastructural facilities.
Jorhat ( JOR-haht/Assamese: [zʊ(ɹ).ɦat]) is a city in the Indian state of Assam, located 300 km east of state capital Dispur. It is the administrative headquarters of the Jorhat District.

Jorhat Gymkhana Club is a multi-purpose stadium located in Jorhat, Assam, built in 1876 by D. Slimmons. It has venues for horse racing, lawn tennis courts, swimming pool, snooker, polo, golf, and cricket.
Dimaruguri is a census town in Nagaon district in the state of Assam, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat?
faq.a: The best time to visit Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jorhat Airport (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat?
faq.a: Stays in Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Burhi Gosani Devalaya Jorhat?
faq.a: The top attractions are Asam Sahitya Sabha, Dipankar Vidyapith, Kumar Kaibarta Gaon, Naubaisa Gaon, Pragya Academy, Jorhat.
